Ntc Of Petition And Motion; Petition To Compel Arbitration And Mtn To Stay Action; Memo Of P And A; Declaration; Pos
Off Calendar Oct-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kathryn Anderson (901.0514) for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances. The matter was not argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HENOK ARAYA'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION TO STAY ACTION is denied. Defendant has failed to show a valid arbitration agreement with most plaintiffs and as to those plaintiffs for which he has shown an agreement, he has waived any right he had to arbitrate. Order signed in open Court. (302/HEK/JW) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash, Request For Judicial Ntc
Off Calendar Sep-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANT HENOK ARAYA'S Motion To Quash (Service of Process).
APPEARANCES: Kathryn L. Anderson, Esq. of Law Offices of Kathryn L. Anderson 901-0514 for pltfs & opposing parties; Joshua E. Kirsch, Esq. of Gibson Robb & Lindh LLP 979-2323 for specially appearing deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. IN WEIGHING THE COMPETING DECLARATIONS, IT IS THE COURT'S CONCLUSION THAT SERVICE HAS BEEN EFFECTED. SEE E.G. IN RE BALL (1934) 2 CAL.APP.2D 578, 579; TRUJILLO V. TRUJILLO (1945) 71 CAL.APP.2D 257, 260. Defendant has 15 days to respond. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiffs, Alazar Abraham, Ogbai Kieane and Gebre Gebreskirtos, are present.
Attorney, Kathyryn Linne Anderson, is present representing the plaintiffs.

Defendant, Henok Araya, an Individual; Henok Araya Corporation, A Michigan Corporation, is not present.
(Default was entered on 6/18/07 as to the defendant)
Per the attorney, the remaining two defendants have been dismissed.

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Alazar Abraham, Ogbai Kieane and Gebre Gebreskirtos are sworn and examined by Kathyryn Linne Anderson.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant, Henok Araya, an Individual; Henok Araya Corporation, A Michigan Corporation, as follows:

Defendant shall pay plaintiff, as and for damages, the sum of $62,059.99 plus interest commencing as of June 1, 2000 as damages and cost in the sum of $582.50 for a total Judgment of $62,642.49. Default Judgment by Court signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up.

Kathryn Anderson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ogbai Kidane etc.
